action.reasoning: Observation: best_v5.pt test AP=0.038 matches EMA AP during training, confirming checkpoint saves EMA weights instead of regular weights. Regular model achieved val AP 0.2359 but wasn't saved. Analysis: Fix train.py to save regular weights, remove broken EMA, resume from best_v2.pt (which has correct weights, test AP 0.2136), train for ~25 epochs. Decision: Write diagnostic to confirm, then fix and retrain.
